heading.title: Assess your innovation's maturity in minutes.
heading.description: Get an instant read on your Technology, Market, and Manufacturing readiness levels, and targeted actions to improve.

information.tooltip: We do not store, retain, or reuse any of the information you enter. All data is processed temporarily and automatically discarded to ensure complete confidentiality.

keys.title: MkRL - Market Readiness Level
keys.description: Is there a customer need? (4 questions)

policy.description: METABUILDING LABS Project has received funding from the European Union's Horizon 2020 Research and Innovation Programme under Grant Agreement No. 953193. The sole responsibility for the content of this document lies entirely with the author's view. The European Commission is not responsible for any use that may be made of the information it contains.

gdprModal.message: This questionnaire uses necessary cookies and local storage to save your progress temporarily. We don't use tracking or advertising cookies, and we don't collect personal information.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: Sorry, we couldn't find the page you're looking for.

form.commentPlaceholder: Add specific notes for your final report (Optional)

leaveQuestionnaireModal.title: Leave questionnaire?
leaveQuestionnaireModal.description: If you leave now, your responses will be lost.

stages.name: TRL
stages.title: Technology Analysis Complete
stages.description: One step down. Now, let's see if the market is ready for it.

stages.name: MkRL
stages.title: Market Context Secured
stages.description: You have covered the "What" and the "Who." Now for the final piece: the "How."

stages.name: MfRL
stages.title: Assessment Complete
stages.description: Your report is ready to be generated. (Last chance to review, answers cannot be changed after this step).

singleReview.commentPlaceholder: Add specific notes for your final report (Optional)

unsavedChangesModal.title: Unsaved changes
unsavedChangesModal.description: You have unsaved changes. If you leave now, your latest updates will be lost.

toast.title: Answer Updated
toast.description: Your updates have been saved successfully

beforeYouGoModal.title: Before you go...
beforeYouGoModal.description: Since we don't save your responses, make sure you've downloaded your assessment report. You won't be able to access it later.

unlockNextLevel.title: Unlock your next level
steps: Connect with the recommended experts to accelerate your success.
Download your report and keep it for future milestones.
unlockNextLevel.clarification: After reviewing your results, save them and reach out to the recommended services. They'll help you close the gaps needed to improve your readiness level.

detailedReport.title: Detailed report
detailedReport.description: Look for the "Service available" tags below to see where our experts can accelerate your progress.

ctaBanner.title: Turn this plan into reality.
ctaBanner.description: Don't tackle these gaps alone. Our experts are ready to help you reach the next maturity level.
ctaBanner.disclaimer: Although the tool was designed by professionals from the building sector, the results of this test do not constitute a formal certificate and are provided for informational purposes only.

resetFormModal.title: Reset questionnaire
resetFormModal.description: This will permanently delete all your answers. We don't store your responses. Download your report now to keep a record of your results.

supportNeeded.title: Support needed for:
supportNeeded.description: Select the specific gaps you would like us to help you solve.

reachOut.title: How can we reach you?
reachOut.description: Please provide your details so our expert knows who to ask for.

successStatus.title: Request sent successfully!
successStatus.description: Our team will review your needs and contact you within 72 hours. In the meantime, don't forget to save your full report.

failedStatus.title: Something went wrong
failedStatus.description: We couldn't send your request. Please check your connection and try again.
